tavily-search.description: Web search via Tavily MCP server. Requires TAVILY_API_KEY.

context7.description: Up-to-date library docs via Context7 MCP server.

brave-search.description: Web and local search via Brave Search API. Requires BRAVE_API_KEY.

postgres.description: PostgreSQL database query access. Requires DATABASE_URL.

puppeteer.description: Headless Chrome browser automation via Puppeteer.

gitnexus.description: GitNexus MCP server — local git intelligence and repository analysis.
